articles.description: Manchester United are left furious over "astonishing" refereeing decisions as two penalties were given  and one was not in their draw at Bournemouth.
articles.title: Manchester United fury at 'astonishing' penalty decisions

articles.description: James Milner - the Premier League's record appearance holder, speaks to reporter Kelly Somers about his career - including a debut goal for hometown club Leeds, a dramatic Champions League semi-final comeback against Barcelona and returning from nine months out injured.
articles.title: James Milner reflects on Jurgen Klopp, small shinpads and whether he really is boring

articles.description: Whisper it quietly, but by the end of 2028 it is predicted there will be more rounds of virtual golf played in the UK than outdoors ones.
articles.title: Virtual golf: The indoor revolution threatening to outstrip outdoor golf

articles.description: Chinese Taipei's Olympic champion Lin Yu-ting is cleared to compete again by World Boxing after undergoing the governing body's new sex test.
articles.title: Lin Yu-ting cleared to compete again by World Boxing after sex test

articles.description: Video review technology will be introduced at Wimbledon for the first time this year.
articles.title: Wimbledon: Video review technology introduced for 2026 tournament

articles.description: Defending champion Jeremiah Azu narrowly misses out on a medal in the men's 60m final at the World Athletics Indoor Championships in Poland.
articles.title: World Athletics Indoor Championships 2026: Jeremiah Azu narrowly misses out on 60m medal

articles.description: British number two Jack Draper is knocked out of the Miami Open in the second round by Reilly Opelka, but Katie Boulter progresses as her opponent Clara Tauson retires injured.
articles.title: Miami Open: Jack Draper knocked out in second round, Katie Boulter through

articles.description: Manchester United and Norway winger Celin Bizet Donnum discusses how she's balancing her pregnancy along with a desire to get back on the football pitch.
articles.title: Celin Bizet Donnum: Manchester United winger on balancing football and pregnancy

articles.description: Ronnie O'Sullivan beats China's Wu Yize in a deciding frame to reach the World Open final, as he hunts a record-extending 42nd ranking title.
articles.title: World Open: Ronnie O'Sullivan beats Wu Yize in decider to reach final

articles.description: Trent Alexander-Arnold's omission from Thomas Tuchel's biggest England squad is the latest blow to his stop-start international career and casts huge doubt on his hopes of playing at the World Cup.
articles.title: Trent Alexander-Arnold's England World Cup hopes in doubt, so what now for Real Madrid defender?
